sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent left knee pain, particularly with weight-bearing activities. He also reports pain in his left hand for the past few days. The patient states his pain lasts only a short time. The patient has a knee. The patient reports knee pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 128/78 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable. No swelling or redness noted in the left knee.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient presents with knee pain and left hand pain. Differential includes osteoarthritis, possible meniscal injury, and musculoskeletal strain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders a lipid panel. The doctor recommends physical therapy. The doctor prescribes meloxicam at 15 mg daily. The doctor orders an echocardiogram.
